p.span: Are there any limitations on your ability to perform in your prospective field of work?
Are there any limitations on your ability to engage in all types of travel? Inside or outside Iraq

li.span: Please list your Main Hobbies and Areas of interest (Give some brief details on two of them):

The Profession of your Mother?
